title: Cataclysmic Combat
description: Compatibility between all weapons in L_Ender 's Cataclysm and Better Combat!
body:
Compatibility between all weapons in L_Ender 's Cataclysm and Better Combat!

 

The two gauntlets, of guard and bulwark, gain fist-type moves and can be dual wielded.

 

The Incinerator has claymore type moves and requires two hand to wield.

 

The Void and Infernal forges both have hammer type moves and require two hands to wield.

 

This requires better combat and L_Ender 's Cataclysm.
